summary: This document contains interview insights from a Practice Manager at a Chelsea GP practice regarding current administrative challenges and potential AI integration benefits. It details the financial dynamics of GP partners, noting that saving a single shift with part-time staff yields real savings, while highlighting frustrations with rigid eConsult systems. The manager emphasizes that value lies in reducing admin work and improving service quality rather than solely shortening consultation times.

sniff_test_notes: Practice name appears to be a pseudonym ('The Good Practice') rather than a real NHS trust name, suggesting anonymization.
